svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', system-ui, sans-serif
svg.title: Codex App Manager
svg.desc: 官方 Codex 桌面应用,一键装好,持续最新 — install, update and uninstall the official Codex desktop app, with mirrors reachable from mainland China.

g.text: Install, update & uninstall the official Codex desktop app — verified byte by byte.
